conflict: Enhancement technology intrudes on the most intimate human experience
consequence: Body autonomy becomes intimate and terrifying; connection deepens through shared horror rather than despite it
must_land_beats: Kai's synthetic muscle moves his hands before conscious intent during sex—grip adjusting with precision that is not his
Lena's desync surfaces during intimacy: she goes still, eyes change, the person behind them briefly absent
Lena describes the desync from inside: being gently moved aside while something smoother takes her place
Kai describes the blackout void: the terror was that his body performed well without him
pressure_source: Enhancement technology intrudes on the most intimate human experience
state_shift: Body autonomy becomes intimate and terrifying; connection deepens through shared horror rather than despite it
